issues.title: SQL injection risk
issues.message: Finding: SQL injection via unsanitized input Evidence: User input concatenated into query Impact: Data breach Fix: Use parameterized queries Severity: critical Confidence: high

issues.title: Unbounded loop without timeout
issues.message: Finding: While loop has no exit condition Evidence: while(true) without break/timeout Impact: Process hang Fix: Add timeout or max iterations Severity: major Confidence: high

issues.title: Missing error handling on fetch
issues.message: Finding: Fetch call without try/catch Evidence: await fetch() on L15 Impact: Unhandled rejection on network failure Fix: Wrap in try/catch Severity: major Confidence: high

issues.title: Inconsistent naming convention
issues.message: Finding: camelCase and snake_case mixed Evidence: getUserData vs get_user_data Impact: Readability Fix: Unify to camelCase Severity: minor Confidence: medium

issues.title: Consider adding JSDoc
issues.message: Finding: Public function lacks documentation Evidence: exportFunction without JSDoc Impact: Maintainability Fix: Add JSDoc comment Severity: info Confidence: low
